questions.question: Which attorneys & law firms in Seattle Wa are open on weekends?
questions.answer: Attorneys & Law Firms in Seattle Wa with weekend hours include: The Law Offices of Kevin Trombold, PLLC (Sat: 00:00 - 24:00), Morgan & Morgan (Sat: 00:00 - 24:00), Daniel Smith Immigration And Family Law (Sat: off), Moseley Collins Law (Sat: 00:00 - 24:00), Oshan & Associates P.C (Sat: 00:00 - 24:00), Buttar & Cantor LLP, Immigration Lawyers (Sat: 09:00-17:00). 6 total with weekend availability.
